feed.title: Maine Law and Legislative Reference Library — New/Popular Items
feed.subtitle:
'NEW or POPULAR ITEMS' section is a heading followed by sibling

entries, not a single selectable list container; monitored by full-page fingerprint. NOTE: the site declares (but does not functionally serve) an Atom feed at /rss.php which currently returns HTTP 500 — worth re-checking periodically in case it is restored.
